steps.title: Compare sales data
steps.content: The sentence needs data showing that the Amiga sold relatively few units. The useful comparison must give the Amiga's correct sales figure and contrast it with a much larger figure from another system.

steps.title: Reject mismatched figures
steps.content: B and C use 3,935,000 as the Amiga figure, but that is not the Amiga's value. D uses the right Amiga figure but assigns 18,450,000 to the wrong system. The answer is A.
